hero.hero_overview: Assassin
hero.hero_strength:
High Burst Damage: His combo (Skill 1 + Ult) can instantly eliminate low-health heroes (squishies).
Defense Reduction: His passive reduces enemy physical defense, allowing him to damage even armored targets.
Easy to Play/Low Cooldowns: Relatively simple to learn, and his skills have short cooldowns, allowing for frequent pick-offs.
Strong Early-Mid Game: He can dominate the early game and dictate the pace of the game if fed.
Good Jungle Clear: Efficient at farming the jungle to secure his power spike, according to the YouTube channel.
hero.hero_weakness:
Extremely Squishy: Lacks sustain and can be killed easily if caught out of position.
Ult Dependent: His effectiveness drops significantly when his ultimate is on cooldown.
Countered by CC/Items: Easily shut down by stun effects and items like Winter Crown or Wind of Nature.
Limited Teamfight Ability: Not effective in full 5v5 teamfights and works best with pick-offs.
Weak Against Shield/Heal: Heroes with high sustain

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Hero with immobilize skill is great to paired with Saber since Saber can end the enemy without any major problems getting countered.

Saber is not that great to paired with hero that has great mobility and explosive damage since Saber can waste his skill either getting his kill stolen or just left in the battlefield and helplessly watch his teammates escaped.

counters.counter_desc: Saber cannot penetrate hero that is having a lot of HP or can sustain massive damage while also having skills to lock up Saber preventing him escape using 2nd skill.
Khufra is just another example why Saber will have some trouble escaping since Khufra's skill can be problematic for Saber's 2nd skill.

Saber greatest benefit is attacking enemy that has no blink or dash skill which makes Saber can leverage 1st skill and 2nd skill efficiently. Layla is one of the example why she's is a great target for Saber.

Saber greatest benefit is attacking enemy that has very squishy HP despite having skill that could immobilize him but could guarantee him a kill if the enemy is alone. Vexana is one of the example why she's is a great target for Saber.

dominants.dominant_desc: This build is essential for Saber to deal an absolute massive damage during early and mid game so that team can pressure the turret easier. This build is not suitable if the game exceeds 20 minutes because Saber is very squishy and can be countered in late game.

emblems.emblem_desc: This is generic emblem setup for Saber

equips.equip_desc: Saber has high output damage and don't engage in fight too much in early game so Sky Piercer is reasonable for first item after boots.

hero.hero_strength: He's a very mobile hero if his skill used efficiently. He could get in and out of battlefield easily where he also has higher chance executing enemy in the process.
hero.hero_weakness: He is a very squishy hero and failing to leverage his 1st skill and 2nd skill is very punishing. He is also a one-shot killer which is not very favorable on late game since counter item can be acquired to disable Saber one-shot kill.

data.recommend: This guide is good for anyone who already familiar with Saber skill combo especially as a jungler.

spell.spell_desc: With very low HP, to compensate this, Saber need to be a jungler since he rarely goes showing himself in battlefield unless required by team.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Lesley can be a a good pair with Saber, with her Ultimate that reveals enemies hiding around the Battlefield.

counters.counter_desc: Khufra is a great choice for counter to Saber, with his tanky capabilities and his Bouncing Ball skill which prevents Saber from jumping or dashing with ease. His Ball charge is great for disrupting Saber's positioning and keeping him from engaging.

dominants.dominant_desc:
- Use your ultimate to pick off squishy enemies.
- Position yourself safely, don't rush blindly.
- Time your skills properly.
- Build tanky of burst damage depending on your team's needs.
- Always look for opportunities to secure isolated targets.

emblems.emblem_desc: The emblem and talents chosen are for perfect utilization of damage for Saber that gives him the burst he needs for squishy heroes in the battlefield.

equips.equip_desc: As an assassin role, these items are useful for Saber for quick assassination of enemies in the battlefield. Magic boots is chosen as it gives cd reduction for his skills which gives him an opportunity to strike back when needed. Blade of the Heptaseas is his key item especially in early game with its passive that can quickly eliminate foes.

hero.hero_overview: An assassin who specializes in quick, powerful bursts of damage and disabling key targets with his precision strikes. His impressive ability to eliminate squishy enemies makes him a popular pick for players looking to take down high-priority targets, such as enemy marksmen and mages, with ruthless efficiency. With a mix of mobility, damage, and crowd control, Saber excels at controlling the pace of fights and picking off foes with deadly precision.
hero.hero_strength:
Strengths:
High burst damage output, especially against squishy targets.
Strong mobility with his dash and ultimate.
Great at assassinating key targets in team fights.
hero.hero_weakness:
Weaknesses:
Low survivability if caught without escape abilities.
Reliant on precise skill timing for maximum effectiveness.

data.recommend: This is a must for those who prefer High Burst Roam heroes especially for the current assassin meta!

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is a preferred battle spell for Saber for better escape, chase, and reposition as a roamer role.

First I like to go for sure hit in roam I dont build full rapid  boots in early but buy just boot and build fury hammer it gives you early physical attack and penetration. Next I build full sky piercer after getting fury hammer even though I hide execute as battle spell I still buy sky piercer:) and then only build blade if heptaseas and So on.

hero.hero_overview:
He is an assassin with high burst damage so here are some early game rotation tips 
1: help you hyper in jungle and gank the lane where it is necessary to not delay your team farm 
2: do not overextend and die in vain play patiently until you get your ult. In turtle fight try to zone out enemy hyper if you have your ult if not then play safe 
3:focus in gold lane to maximize your winning chance but if other lane are not holding them help there too
hero.hero_strength: Even playing as a roam he is very great hero to delete enemies but always focus on squishy and back line of enemy and in early use  your ult wisely before getting some items to counter enemy with high hp and durability. And always use the bushes to surprise your enemies
hero.hero_weakness:
Since he is an assassin he lacks durability and can be countered using some methods like 
1: using purify as a battle spell or in game build winter crown or wind of nature to nullify his damage 
2: pick early game strong hero with high durability

data.recommend: For the player who just started playing and want to enjoy securing kills

spell.spell_desc: Personally I like to build execute for saber roam but flicker is also a great option. Execute helps me to secure kills in early game even some high durability hero cannot survive full combo with execute
